name: Arizer 3′ Whip
summary: Arizer 3′ Whip — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Arizer 3′ Whip is equipped with a Direct Draw feature and 360° swivel action, designed for compatibility with the Arizer XQ2, Extreme Q, and V-Tower vaporisers. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
